subcodes.first_line: We make mention of him who hath made mention of Us, and give glad-tidings unto them who have believed in God, the Lord of all worlds. That which was hidden hath been made manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نذکر من ذکرنا و نبشر الذین آمنوا بالله رب العالمین قد ظهر ما کان مستورا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement
